army_rules.name: Blessings of Khorne
army_rules.description: If your Army Faction is WORLD EATERS , at the start of the battle round, you can make a Blessings of Khorne roll. To do so, roll eight D6. You can then use those dice to activate up to two Blessings of Khorne (see below). Each Blessing of Khorne specifies the dice results it requires (where a number is specified, a double or triple of that value or higher is required). You can only activate each Blessing of Khorne once per battle round. Any unused dice from the Blessings of Khorne roll are then discarded. Once activated, each Blessing of Khorne applies to all units from your army with this ability until the end of the battle round. **Example**: Ash makes a Blessings of Khorne roll, getting the following: 1, 2, 2, 2, 3, 4, 6, 6. First they use the two 6s to activate Warp Blades (which requires a double 5+ ), leaving the following dice: 1, 2, 2, 2, 3, 4. They then use the two 2s to activate Unbridled Bloodlust. Now that two Blessings of Khorne have been activated, no more can be activated and the remaining dice are discarded. Unbridled Bloodlust Unbridled Bloodlust can be activated with a Blessings of Khorne roll of any double. This unit has +1 to charge rolls . Rage-Fuelled Invigoration Rage-fuelled Invigoration can be activated with a Blessings of Khorne roll of a double 2 or higher. Each time a model in this unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3". Total Carnage Total Carnage can be activated with a Blessings of Khorne roll of a double 3 or higher. Each time a model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play. Martial Excellence Martial Excellence can be activated with a Blessings of Khorne roll of a double 4 or higher, or any triple. Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Warp Blades Warp Blades can be activated with a Blessings of Khorne roll of a double 5 or higher, or a triple 2 or higher. Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability Decapitating Strikes Decapitating Strikes can be activated with a Blessings of Khorne roll of a double 6, or a triple 3 or higher. Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack that targets an INFANTRY unit, that attack has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

detachment_rule.name: Relentless Rage
detachment_rule.description: Each time a WORLD EATERS unit from your army makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic and add 2 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

enhancements.name: Battle-lust
enhancements.description: You can re-roll Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit. In addition, while the Unbridled Bloodlust Blessing of Khorne is active for your army, add 1 to Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Berzerker Glaive
enhancements.description: Add 1 to the Attacks and Damage characteristics of melee weapons (excluding Extra Attacks weapons) equipped by the bearer.

enhancements.name: Favoured of Khorne
enhancements.description: Each time you make a Blessings of Khorne roll, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can re-roll up to two of the D6 rolled.

enhancements.name: Helm of Brazen Ire
enhancements.description: Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Blood Offering
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS unit from your army that was just destroyed while it was within range of one or more objective markers you controlled at the end of the previous phase. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Select one of those objective markers. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Hack and Slash
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase and that made a charge move this turn.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1.

stratagems.name: Frenzied Resilience
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Skulls for the Skull Throne!
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after a WORLD EATERS unit from your army destroys a CHARACTER or MONSTER model.
stratagems.target: That WORLD EATERS unit.
stratagems.effect: Make a Blessings of Khorne roll and use the results to activate one Blessing of Khorne. Until the end of the battle round, that Blessing of Khorne is active in addition to any other Blessings of Khorne that are currently active.

stratagems.name: Apoplectic Frenzy
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, ,just after a KHORNE BERZERKERS unit from your army is selected to Advance.
stratagems.target: That KHORNE BERZERKERS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Berzerker’s Wrath
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One KHORNE BERZERKERS unit from your army that can make a surge move as a result of those attacks.
stratagems.effect: Do not roll a D6 to determine how far models in your unit can move when they make a surge move . Instead, when making a surge move , those models can move up to 8".

detachment_rule.name: Rampaging Terrors
detachment_rule.description: Friendly Daemon Vehicle units have the following ability: Terror of Khorne: At the start of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit engaged with this unit. That enemy unit makes a battle‑shock roll , with -1 to that battle‑shock roll . You cannot select the same enemy unit for this effect more than once per phase. This detachment has the onslaught tag and cannot be taken with another onslaught detachment .

enhancements.name: Murder-forged Entity (Upgrade)
enhancements.description: This unit has Daemon .

enhancements.name: Talons of Butchery (Upgrade)
enhancements.description: This unit’s Maulerfiend Fists have [Cleave 2] .

stratagems.name: Apoplectic Clarity
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when a friendly Daemon Vehicle unit is selected to attack .
stratagems.target: That Daemon Vehicle unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit’s attacks can ignore modifiers to:

stratagems.name: Goaded to Fury
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit that targeted a friendly unengaged Daemon Vehicle unit (excluding Titanic units) has shot.
stratagems.target: That Daemon Vehicle unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a surge move of up to D6".

stratagems.name: Trail of Destruction
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Daemon Vehicle unit is selected to move .
stratagems.target: That Daemon Vehicle unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit has Mobile .

detachment_rule.name: Adamantine Avalanche
detachment_rule.description: At the start of the Fight phase, if a friendly TERMINATOR SQUAD unit is engaged , make a Blessings of Khorne roll and use the results to activate one Blessing of Khorne . Until the end of the phase, that Blessing of Khorne is active for friendly TERMINATOR SQUAD units in addition to any other Blessings of Khorne that are currently active.

enhancements.name: Gore-stained Veterans (Upgrade)
enhancements.description: This unit’s melee attacks have +1 WS .

enhancements.name: Sanctified in Slaughter (Upgrade)
enhancements.description: This unit has +1 OC .

stratagems.name: Focused Ferocity
stratagems.when: Fight phase, when a friendly Terminator Squad unit is selected to fight .
stratagems.target: That Terminator Squad unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit’s melee attacks have +1 A .

stratagems.name: A Trophy for the Throne
stratagems.when: Fight phase, when a friendly Terminator Squad unit is selected to fight .
stratagems.target: That Terminator Squad unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit’s attacks that target a Monster/Vehicle unit have +1 to wound rolls .

stratagems.name: Wrath Beyond Reason
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting Phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly Terminator Squad unit.
stratagems.target: That Terminator Squad unit.
stratagems.effect: Ranged attacks that target your unit have -1 D until that enemy unit has attacked.

detachment_rule.name: Keywords
detachment_rule.description: JAKHALS and GOREMONGERS units from your army have the BATTLELINE keyword.

enhancements.name: Brazen Form
enhancements.description: Add 1 to the bearer’s Toughness characteristic and the bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

enhancements.name: Butcher Lord
enhancements.description: During the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a JAKHALS or GOREMONGERS unit. If attached to a GOREMONGERS unit, the bearer has the Infiltrators ability.

enhancements.name: Chosen of the Blood God
enhancements.description: Add 3" to the range of the bearer’s Aura abilities.

enhancements.name: Strategic Slaughter
enhancements.description: After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three JAKHALS and/or GOREMONGERS units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: Bloody Vengeance
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS MONSTER or WORLD EATERS TITANIC unit from your army that was just destroyed by an enemy unit. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a model in a JAKHALS or GOREMONGERS unit from your army makes an attack that targets the enemy unit that just destroyed your unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Drawn to the Slaughter
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One JAKHALS unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength.

stratagems.name: In the Shadow of Brass Idols
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One JAKHALS or GOREMONGERS unit from your army that was selected as the target as one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability. If your unit is within 6" of one or more friendly WORLD EATERS MONSTER units, or within 9" of one or more friendly WORLD EATERS TITANIC units, your unit has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability instead.

stratagems.name: Bloodthirsty Horde
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One JAKHALS or GOREMONGERS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase and is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit is selected to fight, when determining which models in it are eligible to fight, any models in your unit that are within 3" of one or more enemy models are eligible to fight. When resolving those attacks, such models can target one of those enemy units that is within 3" of them and within Engagement Range of their unit.

stratagems.name: Fail Not The Blood God
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One JAKHALS or GOREMONGERS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If that model’s unit is within 6" of one or more friendly WORLD EATERS MONSTER units, or within 9" of one or more friendly WORLD EATERS TITANIC units, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

stratagems.name: Brazen Idol
stratagems.when: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS MONSTER or WORLD EATERS TITANIC unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select the Idol of Infinite Rage, Idol of Burning Wrath or Idol of Blessed Blood. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Idols of Khorne ability is active for your unit instead of any other Idols of Khorne ability that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that ability this battle.

detachment_rule.name: Rush to the Fray
detachment_rule.description: Each time a WORLD EATERS unit from your army disembarks from a TRANSPORT, until the end of the turn, add 1 to Charge rolls made for that unit and that unit’s melee weapons have the [LANCE] ability.

enhancements.name: Aggressive Deployment
enhancements.description: In the Declare Battle Formations step, if the bearer starts the battle embarked within a DEDICATED TRANSPORT, that DEDICATED TRANSPORT has the Scouts 9" ability.

enhancements.name: Infernal Infusion
enhancements.description: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer’s unit has the Fights First ability.

enhancements.name: Murderous Onslaught
enhancements.description: If the bearer’s unit disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn, until the end of the turn, enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Unleash Hell
enhancements.description: At the start of your Shooting phase, you can select one VEHICLE model within 6" of the bearer or, if the bearer is embarked within a TRANSPORT, you can select that TRANSPORT model. Until the end of the phase, after the selected model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Endless Pursuit of Violence
stratagems.when: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS INFANTRY unit from your army and one friendly TRANSPORT that it is able to embark within.
stratagems.effect: If your WORLD EATERS INFANTRY unit is wholly within 6" of that TRANSPORT , it can embark within it.

stratagems.name: Smash Through
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS VEHICLE model from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal or Advance move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Aggressive Disembarkation
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS RHINO model from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: One WORLD EATERS unit embarked within your RHINO can disembark. When doing so, models in that unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 6" of your RHINO and can be set up within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

stratagems.name: Full-Throttle Assault
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS RHINO model from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a WORLD EATERS unit disembarks from that model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

stratagems.name: Unrelenting Advance
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS VEHICLE model from your army that was hit by one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your model can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: Fury Unleashed
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS RHINO model from your army that has one or more wounds remaining and was hit by one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: One KHORNE BERZERKERS unit embarked within your model can make a disembark move and then make a surge move of up to D6+2".

detachment_rule.name: Brazen Fury
detachment_rule.description: WORLD EATERS POSSESSED units from your army have the following ability: Brazen Fury: In your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit has shot, if a model in this unit was destroyed as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a surge move of up to D6”. That surge move is a Brazen Fury move .

enhancements.name: Frenzied Focus
enhancements.description: Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 5+, instead of only a 6.

enhancements.name: Killing Clarity
enhancements.description: Each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy unit, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Malicious Vigour
enhancements.description: Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Brazen Fury move, it is treated as having rolled a 6 for the distance the unit can be moved.

enhancements.name: Violent Demise
enhancements.description: The bearer’s Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 2+ instead of on a 6. In addition, the bearer has the Deadly Demise D3+1 ability, instead of the Deadly Demise D3 ability.

stratagems.name: Daemonic Resistance
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS POSSESSED unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Daemonic Strength
stratagems.when: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS POSSESSED unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack made by a model in your unit is allocated to an enemy model, if your unit has the EIGHTBOUND keyword and that enemy model is not a MONSTER or VEHICLE, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack. If your unit has the EXALTED EIGHTBOUND keyword and that enemy model is a MONSTER or VEHICLE, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack instead.

stratagems.name: Immortal Fury
stratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS POSSESSED unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Rapid Manifestation
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One EXALTED EIGHTBOUND unit from your army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.

stratagems.name: Warp Stalkers
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS POSSESSED unit from your army that has not been selected to move or declare a charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move through enemy models (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES ). When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of such models but, unless that move was a Charge move, it cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

stratagems.name: Horrifying Violence
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Command phase.
stratagems.target: One WORLD EATERS POSSESSED unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Each enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

detachment_rule.name: Wrath of Khorne
detachment_rule.description: When a friendly World Eaters Character unit (excluding EPIC HERO units) is selected to fight , that unit's Character models' melee attacks can have: [Cleave 1] . Or: +1 AP .

enhancements.name: Archslaughterer
enhancements.description: (Once per battle, per army) In your Command phase, you can use this ability. If you do, every Blessing of Khorne is active for this unit until the start of your next turn.

enhancements.name: Gateways to Glory
enhancements.restriction: World Eaters Daemon Prince model only.
enhancements.description: This model has: Mobile . +1 to charge rolls .

stratagems.name: Scorn the Witch
stratagems.when: Any phase, when a friendly World Eaters Character unit (excluding EPIC HERO units) suffers a mortal wound .
stratagems.target: That World Eaters Character unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit has Feel No Pain 4+ against mortal wounds .

stratagems.name: Punish the Craven
stratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, when a unit is selected to make a fall-back move , if that unit is engaged with a friendly World Eaters Character unit.
stratagems.target: That World Eaters Character unit.
stratagems.effect: When an enemy unit engaged with your unit is selected to make a fall-back move , that enemy unit must use the desperate escape mode. If that enemy unit is battle-shocked , -1 from those hazard rolls .

stratagems.name: Aspire to Infamy
stratagems.when: Fight phase, when a friendly World Eaters Character unit (excluding EPIC HERO units) is selected to fight .
stratagems.target: That World Eaters Character unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit's Character models' melee attacks have:
